name: social-companion-extension
description: Premium companion for YouTube, X (Twitter), and Reddit.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.copy-dist: mkdir -p dist/icons && cp manifest.json background.js content.js dictionary.js dashboard.html dashboard.js helpers.js dist/ && cp icons/*.png dist/icons/
scripts.build:safari: npm run clean && npm run copy-dist && DEVELOPER_DIR=/Applications/Xcode-beta.app/Contents/Developer xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist --macos-only --swift --no-open --copy-resources --force --no-prompt --project-location safari
scripts.build:zip: npm run clean && npm run copy-dist && cd dist && zip -r ../social_companion.zip *
